revision.comment: Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 15:49:15
Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 19:17:27 on [[Template:Color/styles.css]]
Allow use of notheme class to override

Protected "[[Template:Color/styles.css]]": [[Wikipedia:High-risk templates|High-risk template or module]]: 467619 transclusions ([[User:MusikBot II/TemplateProtector|more info]]) ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))
/* {{pp-template}} */
remove stuff that should go in /doc
Fixes [[phab:T369874]]. Please see talk page and do not revert without discussion (and good reason). See also [[meta:User:Jon_(WMF)/Edit_for_dark_mode_support]]
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 8 revisions imported
